security.csp: default-src 'self' http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' http://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://civitai.com https://*.civitai.com https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://ollama.com ws://localhost:8188 ws://127.0.0.1:8188; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://localhost:8188 http://127.0.0.1:8188 https://*.civitai.com https://*.githubusercontent.com; media-src 'self' blob: http://localhost:8188 http://127.0.0.1:8188; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'

bundle.shortDescription: Private, local AI chat, image, and video generation
bundle.longDescription: Locally Uncensored is an open-source desktop app that runs AI chat, image generation, and video generation entirely on your own machine. Auto-detects 12 local backends (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, KoboldCpp, llama.cpp, LocalAI, Jan, TabbyAPI, GPT4All, Aphrodite, SGLang, TGI). Includes a coding agent (Codex), an agent mode with 14 tools and MCP support, A/B model comparison, local benchmarking, document chat with RAG, voice chat, and remote access from your phone over LAN or Cloudflare Tunnel. No telemetry, no analytics, no data leaves your device.
